## Checklist

- [ ] Server-side authorization enforced (permission + resource scope + lifecycle state); no client-trusted claims
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive record contents committed or logged
- [ ] Mobile-first; SVG icons (no emoji); no color-only status
- [ ] Conventional Commit messages with the `Co-Authored-By` trailer
